headline: Assessing ONEOK (OKE) Valuation As Analyst Targets And DCF Estimates Send Mixed Signals
summary: Recent performance snapshot and company profile ONEOK (OKE) has drawn investor attention after recent price moves, with the stock last closing at US$91.03. That sits alongside a month return of 7.30% and a past 3 months return of 5.71%. The US$55.94b midstream company reports annual revenue of US$35.20b and net income of US$3.53b, with operations spanning natural gas gathering and processing, liquids, pipelines, and refined products and crude across key US basins.
